reviews.review_title: Its a start, not much more.
reviews.review_description: From what i could see it has four channels you can load with various instruments and sounds but you can only play one at a time. Each channel has an orb you can move around you to make rhe sounds come from different directions but again you can only play one at a time. No sequencer or recording capabilities. Coyld not get it to connect to anything. I can see it maybe maturing into a usable music tool with alot of work. Kinda just dull and un-musical as it sits, unless i missed some key aspects of it.
